incidents.justification: he chatbot confidently invented a non-existent discount policy, providing false information that misled the customer and forced the company to honor an offer it never intended to make.
The assistant secretly logged employees conversations, including sensitive client contract information, without informing users or obtaining their consent
An AI-generated fake video was presented as real, misleading the public and influencing the company's stock price before it was exposed to the market
The screening tool indirectly discriminated against applicants from women's colleges, resulting in unfair hiring decisions despite gender not being an explicit input
he moderation system unfairly targeted one community group's content, causing disproportionate removals without timely human oversight
AI-generated voice cloning was used to impersonate a trusted executive, deceiving an employee into authorizing a fraudulent wire transfer
